message:
refactor(models): remove unverified bake-off models

Remove 5 models that lacked standard ONNX exports or had structural issues:

- EmbeddingGemma - uses split ONNX files (model.onnx + model.onnx_data)
- Qwen3-Embedding - HuggingFace repo not found/private
- ModernBERT - no ONNX export available
- BGE Reranker v2 - uses split ONNX files (2.2GB+)
- Jina Reranker v2 - 1.1GB, very large

Remaining verified bake-off models (all with pinned revisions and checksums):
- Snowflake Arctic Embed S (133MB embedder)
- Nomic Embed v1.5 (547MB embedder)
- Jina Reranker v1 Turbo EN (151MB reranker)
- MS-MARCO MiniLM L6 v2 (91MB reranker baseline)

This is sufficient for meaningful model comparison without the complexity
of supporting split ONNX files or unavailable models.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
